/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -O2 -fPIC -fstack-protector-strong -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -pipe -fvisibility=hidden -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared  -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/secure_app_core.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libsecure_app_core.so -o libsecure_app_core.so CMakeFiles/secure_app_core.dir/src/app_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/secure_app_core.dir/src/anti_re.cpp.o CMakeFiles/secure_app_core.dir/src/license_embed.cpp.o CMakeFiles/secure_app_core.dir/src/verifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/secure_app_core.dir/src/secure_logger.cpp.o  /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so -ldl /usr/lib/libbrotlicommon.so /usr/lib/libbrotlienc.so /usr/lib/libbrotlidec.so /usr/lib/libz.so /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so
